Activity: Jill Fox
...
I’m excited to share that I’ll be joining Ollie’s as an IT Product Manager!

I’m truly looking forward to this next step in my career journey and deeply grateful to everyone who has supported me along the way. Wishing all the best to my former RITE AID colleagues — I hope each of you finds a role and company that you truly enjoy.
...
I can’t wait to contribute to Ollie’s continued growth and innovation in the retail space!
...
🔄 Two Decades. One Word. Restarting.
...
About twenty minutes ago, the last image appearing on my Rite Aid issued laptop before it was wiped was a blue screen that read:  Restarting…..
...
After spending about two decades with Rite Aid Corporation, that word feels like the perfect metaphor. “Restarting” is both an ending and a new beginning.
...
I’m grateful for the chance Rite Aid provided me to grow and contribute alongside the most talented and dedicated people in the pharmacy, IT, and compliance spaces. Together we navigated challenges, celebrated wins, and built innovative solutions around the best pharmacy dispensing system in the industry, all while making a positive impact in healthcare for patients, communities, and most importantly one another. 

But beyond the projects and deliverables, what I’ll carry with me are the friendships, the shared laughs, and the countless moments of teamwork that turned colleagues into family.
...
To my Rite Aid friends and coworkers — thank you. Thank you for your professionalism, your partnership, and your humanity. I wish each of you continued success and fulfillment in your next chapters.  As for me, I’m embracing this restart with gratitude and excitement for what’s ahead. #Gratitude #CareerJourney #Leadership #Healthcare #NewBeginnings #ProfessionalGrowth #Restart

results.title: Optum Hiring Data Scientist | Jobformore
highlights:
Optum Hiring Data Scientist | Jobformore
...
# Data Scientist
...
Optum is seeking a Data Science professional who is passionate about applying machine learning, Generative AI, and Large Language Models (LLMs) to solve complex healthcare problems on a scale. Imagine working with massive volumes of healthcare data spanning clinical, claims, behavioral, and digital interactions – powering intelligent personalization, discovery, and decision support for millions of members, providers, and care teams.
...
At Optum, the Data Science mission is to transform healthcare data into robust, scalable AI solutions, including LLM based and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems that combine enterprise knowledge with advanced language models to deliver accurate, contextual, and trustworthy insights. These solutions help uncover deep usage patterns, member journeys, and care signals that inform and continuously evolve Optum’s digital products, clinical platforms, and healthcare services.
...
Your work will directly influence how healthcare consumers engage with digital experiences, how clinicians access timely insights, and how business and care strategies are shaped through data. By joining Optum’s data science team, you will be part of an exciting journey to build advanced ML and GenAI driven products, grounded in responsible AI principles, that operate at enterprise scale and create meaningful impact across the healthcare ecosystem.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy advanced analytics, machine learning, and Generative AI solutions to address complex healthcare and business problems using largescale structured and unstructured data
...
- Applies advanced techniques including statistics, machine learning, simulation, and mathematical modelling
...
- Build and optimize LLM based applications, including Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) frameworks, to enable accurate, context aware, and explainable insights from enterprise healthcare data sources such as clinical notes, claims, provider data, and policy documents
...
- Develop, evaluate, and finetune machine learning and GenAI models, including prompt engineering, retrieval strategies, and model evaluation techniques to improve accuracy, relevance, and performance
...
- Translate complex analytical and GenAI outputs into clear, actionable insights for business stakeholders, product teams, and leadership to support data driven decision making
...
- Support prototyping, validation, and deployment of GenAI and ML solutions, working with engineering teams to ensure solutions are scalable, secure, and maintainable. Continuously stay current with advancements in LLMs, GenAI frameworks, and healthcare AI trends, contributing innovative ideas and improvements to Optum’s capabilities
...
### Required Qualifications:
...
- 4+ years of experience in handling/active development in data science projects
...
- 4+ years of experience in Microsoft Azure Cloud, Databricks, Mlflow, Spark SQL & Python
...
- Experience using Machine Learning Algorithms: Linear & Logistic Regression, Time Series analysis, Support Vector Machine, K-Means clustering, K-Nearest Neighbors Decision Trees, Random Forest, Naive Bayes, PCA, SVD, Artificial Neural Networks, Association Rules, Genetic Algorithm, Optimization, Bagging and Boosting algorithms etc.
...
- Understanding of data, schema, data model, machine learning and how to bring efficiency in big data related life cycle
...
- Proven skills to create opportunities using machine learning or artificial intelligence
...
Optum, part of UnitedHealth Group, is a global health services and technology company revolutionizing healthcare delivery through data analytics, pharmacy benefits, and digital health solutions that connect millions to better care. Headquartered in Eden Prairie, Minnesota, Optum serves patients, providers, payers, and pharmacies worldwide with innovative platforms for care optimization, claims processing, and population health management.

results.title: [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II | Wfh
highlights:
# [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II
...
Note: The job is a remote job and is open to candidates in USA. Cotiviti is a healthcare technology company focused on delivering better care at lower costs through advanced technology and data analytics. The Senior Generative AI Scientist II will work with a team to solve healthcare issues using machine learning and AI techniques, delivering value through innovative data solutions. Responsibilities • Work with key stakeholders within Research and Development as well as Business Operations, along with Product Management to assess the potential value and risks associated with business problems that have the potential to be solved using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence techniques • Develop an exploratory data analysis approach to verify the initial hypothesis associated with potential Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning use cases • Document your approach, thinking and results in standard approaches to allow other data scientists to collaborate with you on this work • Prepare your final trained model and develop a validation test set for QA • Work with ML Ops/Production operations to deploy your model into production and support them in monitoring model performance • Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform • Participate in other data science initiatives, collaborating with your peers to support their projects • Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team • Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption • Complete all responsibilities as outlined in the annual performance review and/or goal setting • Complete all special projects and other duties as assigned • Must be able to perform duties with or without reasonable accommodation Skills • Graduate degree in a quantitative discipline such as Computer Science/Engineering, Statistics, Operations Research covering Advanced Statistics, Machine learning and AI • Experience with the latest techniques in natural language processing including transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, measuring/benchmarking and deploying LLMs with tools such as HuggingFace, Langchain, LLAMA/Mistral and OpenAI, vector databases • 5+ years of hands-on data science/AI experience, using typical machine learning and data science tools including pandas, scikit-learn, keras, nltk, and TensorFlow/PyTorch, GPU • Experience building production-grade machine learning deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP • Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets • Experience communicating technical concepts to non-technical and technical audiences is a plus • Flexibility to work with global teams as well geographically dispersed US based teams • Professional with ability to properly handle confidential information • Ability to work within a matrixed organization • Proficiency in all required skills and competencies above Benefits • Medical • Dental • Vision • Disability • Life insurance coverage • 401(k) savings plans • Paid family leave • 9 paid holidays per year • 17-27 days of Paid Time Off (PTO) per year, depending on specific level and length of service with Cotiviti. Company Overview • Cotiviti enables healthcare organizations to deliver better care at lower cost through advanced technology and data analytics that improve the quality and sustainability of healthcare in the United States. It was founded in 1979, and is headquartered in South Jordan, UT, US, with a workforce of 5001-10000 employees. Its website is Company H1B Sponsorship • Cotiviti has a track record of offering H1B sponsorships, with 165 in 2025, 118 in 2024, 90 in 2023, 102 in 2022, 72 in 2021, 67 in 2020. Please note that this does not guarantee sponsorship for this specific role.

...
• Lead the technical design and deployment of multi-agent systems capable of autonomous hypothesis generation and tool use, including genomic variant calling, LLM fine-tuning, and clinical trial matching pipelines • Incorporate and advance Natera’s transformer-based foundation model by integrating DNA, RNA, and H&E imaging modalities for multi-step biological reasoning and tool use • Implement advanced LLM reasoning frameworks, such as ReAct and Chain-of-Thought, alongside reinforcement fine-tuning (RFT) to ensure agents provide accurate, explainable clinical rationales • Architect systems that autonomously translate complex, multi-modal data into diagnostic and therapeutic insights with human-verifiable reasoning and tracing • Own the technical strategy and product roadmap for agentic workflows across the Biopharma Solutions and Therapeutics Discovery division, converting complex clinical challenges into scalable AI systems • Establish production-grade machine learning engineering standards and reproducible architectures across the AI team to ensure absolute model transparency and scientific auditability • Drive cross-functional alignment and technical consensus by defending agentic architectures and biological reasoning frameworks in rigorous peer reviews
...

...
• PhD or Master's degree in Computer Science, Bioinformatics, Statistics, or a related quantitative field • 8 or more years of experience in AI research or engineering, with a proven track record of moving multi-agent orchestration architectures or large-scale language model workflows from prototype to production • Deep experience with agentic frameworks, such as LangChain or Claude Agent SDK, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and validation frameworks for autonomous AI agents • Strong understanding of cancer genomics (WES/WTS), mutational signatures, and structure-activity relationships • Advanced production-level development experience using PyTorch and experience with distributed training on large GPU clusters, including NVIDIA H100s.

Senior ML engineer on Walmart's Catalog Data Science team building production GenAI and deep learning models for product attribute extraction, classification, and catalog optimization at petabyte scale.

About Team The Catalog Data Science Team at Walmart Global Tech is focused on using the latest research in generative AI (GenAI), artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning (ML), statistics, deep learning, computer vision and optimization to implement solutions that ensure Walmart’s product catalog is accurate, complete, and optimized for customer experience. Our team tackles complex data science and ML engineering challenges related to product classification, attribute extraction, trust & safety, and catalog optimization, empowering next-generation retail use cases. We take pride in writing solid production code in Python, deploying and supporting model services and pipelines, and pushing the boundaries in latency, throughput, and scalability.
...
As a Senior Data Scientist (Machine Learning Engineer) on the Catalog Data Quality team, you will collaborate with other Data Scientists and ML Engineers to develop, deploy, and scale machine learning models in production to extract attributes from product information. You will play a key role in supporting the attribute extraction platform and catalog data quality solutions — adding capabilities and driving adoption of GenAI-powered solutions to increase the coverage and accuracy of the Walmart's product catalog. The Data Science and ML Engineering community at Walmart Global Tech is active in most of the Hack events, utilizing the petabytes of data at our disposal, to build some of the coolest ideas. All the work we do at Walmart Global Tech will eventually benefit our operations & our associates, helping Customers Save Money to Live Better.

results.title: Distinguished Data Scientist: Associate AI Experience at Walmart | Jeremy
highlights:
Distinguished Data Scientist: Associate AI Experience at Walmart
...
# Distinguished Data Scientist: Associate AI Experience
...
Distinguished individual contributor role leading next-generation agentic AI systems and autonomous agents at enterprise scale across Walmart's global operations, combining deep ML/AI expertise with cross-functional mentorship and high-impact productionized solutions.
...
We are seeking a Distinguished Data Scientist to provide technical leadership and long‑term vision for next‑generation AI systems and platforms. This senior individual contributor will drive breakthrough system design and advanced solution development that transforms Walmart at scale. The role combines deep technical expertise (ML, simulation, optimization, agentic AI) with cross‑functional influence, mentoring of senior talent, and delivery of high‑impact, productionized solutions. You will be a great fit if: - You architect end-to-end ML/AI systems — from feature engineering through production deployment and monitoring - You’ve built and shipped multiple autonomous AI agents (not just experimented with LLM APIs) - You’re Level 5+ on Steve Yegge’s Vibe Coding scale and can ship production systems through AI-assisted development - You combine deep statistical rigor with practical business impact
...
About the Team The Associate AI Experiences team applies advanced data science, machine learning, and agentic AI to solve high-impact business problems across Walmart globally. You’ll build production Agentic systems, deploy autonomous AI agents, and translate complex data into actionable insights that drive measurable business value at massive scale. Our team builds intelligent platforms, agents and ML-powered solutions that make associates’ jobs easier, faster, and more fulfilling across stores, fulfillment centers, distribution centers, and home office. We leverage the Element LLM Gateway to safely access state-of-the-art language models while keeping all data within Walmart’s network. Our work spans NLP, computer vision, time series forecasting, and multi-agent AI systems at enterprise scale.
...
- Build and deploy production ML systems end-to-end: data pipelines, feature stores, model training, serving layers, monitoring, and feedback loops at scale
...
- Provide technical visionand lead advanced development in agentic AI, reinforcement learning, and simulation.
...
- Architect and deploy large-scale AI systems and autonomous AI agents — conversational assistants, predictive agents with tool-calling, and multi-agent orchestration systems using LangChain, Pydantic AI, and RAG patterns
...
- Deploy NLP pipelines at enterprise scale — semantic similarity across millions of records using BERT/SBERT embeddings and vector search (FAISS)
...
- Deep expertise in ML algorithms (XGBoost, CatBoost, LightGBM, Random Forest, AutoML) and deep learning (PyTorch, transformer architectures).
...
- Production experience with NLP (BERT, SBERT, FAISS, RAG), computer vision (YOLO, CLIP), and time series forecasting (ARIMA, Prophet).
...
- Hands-on experience building and orchestrating multiple AI agents with LangChain, RAG, tool integration, and memory management.
...
- Multi-cloud ML platform proficiency — AWS SageMaker AND GCP (Vertex AI, BigQuery, BigQuery ML).
...
- Strong Python skills (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn) with containerization (Docker) and MLOps practices.
...
- Masters degree in Statistics, Economics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field AND 8+ years’ experience in data science or Machine Learning roles with demonstrated impact.
...
- PhD in AI, Machine Learning, Computer Science, Information Technology, Statistics, Applied Mathematics, Econometrics, or related field with relevant industry experience.

The Senior Engineer, AI is responsible for building AI and Machine learning models and pipelines, with a focus on generative AI, LLMs and predictive modelling. You should have hands on experience with common machine learning and AI frameworks, and a good knowledge of AI and machine learning fundamentals (deep learning, regression, classification and clustering algorithms), retrieval augmented generation pipelines, as well as a good grasp of the design and evaluation of LLM-supported use cases.

You will work at the intersection of data science, AI innovation, and enterprise technology to deliver intelligent products and capabilities that drive productivity, automation, and enhanced user experiences across the organization. Data Analysis & Insights: Analyze large-scale datasets using statistical methods and advanced analytical frameworks to uncover actionable patterns and measure AI/ML impact.
...
Digital Workplace & Employee Experience: Partner cross-functionally to deliver high-impact AI/ML use cases—including predictive analytics, anomaly detection, and workflow automation—across enterprise digital workplace platforms.
...
Collaboration, Technical Leadership & AI Governance: Serve as a subject matter expert in ML and GenAI, mentoring team members, driving actionable business recommendations, and contributing to responsible AI governance frameworks.

- 5+ years of hands-on experience delivering production-level ML/AI solutions with strong expertise in Generative AI, LLMs, RAG architectures, and prompt engineering.

Advanced proficiency in Python, ML/AI frameworks (scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Hugging Face, LangChain), NLP techniques, SQL, and large-scale data platforms (Databricks, Spark, BigQuery).
...
Hands-on experience with MLOps practices (model versioning, CI/CD, experiment tracking, monitoring) and cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, GCP) and their AI/ML services.
...
- Preferred Qualifications
...
- Master's degree or Ph.D. in Data Science, Computer Science, Machine Learning, Statistics, Mathematics, Computational Linguistics, or a related quantitative field.
...
Experience with vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, FAISS), AI orchestration frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex, Semantic Kernel), and enterprise AI platforms such as Azure OpenAI Service or Azure Machine Learning.
...
Knowledge of digital workplace technologies (Microsoft 365, ServiceNow, endpoint management) with experience in enterprise telemetry and application usage analytics.

...
Experience with computer vision or multi-modal AI, prior work in healthcare or enterprise IT environments, and relevant cloud AI/ML certifications (Azure AI Engineer, AWS ML Specialty, Google Professional ML Engineer).
...
- Education
- Bachelor’s degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Machine Learning, Statistics, Mathematics, Computational Linguistics, or a related quantitative field.

## Job description
...
Google's software engineers develop the next-generation technologies that change how billions of users connect, explore, and interact with information and one another. Our products need to handle information at massive scale, and extend well beyond web search. We're looking for engineers who bring fresh ideas from all areas, including information retrieval, distributed computing, large-scale system design, networking and data storage, security, artificial intelligence, natural language processing, UI design and mobile; the list goes on and is growing every day. As a software engineer, you will work on a specific project critical to Google’s needs with opportunities to switch teams and projects as you and our fast-paced business grow and evolve. We need our engineers to be versatile, display leadership qualities and be enthusiastic to take on new problems across the full-stack as we continue to push technology forward.
...
As a Software Engineer on the Shopping Ads team, you will be an "AI First" engineer dedicated to solving complex issues using Generative AI . You will design, implement, and launch innovative Large Language Model (LLM) and Machine Learning (ML) systems to enhance the shopping journey for users worldwide.

# **Experienced Full Stack Data Scientist – Advanced Analytics and Machine Learning**
...
**Join arenaflex, a leading healthcare and retail company, in revolutionizing the way we approach data-driven decision making. As a Senior Data Scientist, you will be at the forefront of developing and implementing cutting-edge analytics and machine learning solutions to drive business growth and improve patient outcomes.**
...
As a Senior Data Scientist at arenaflex, you will be responsible for:
...
- Building and deploying advanced machine learning models using technical expertise in device learning, statistical modeling, probability and decision theory, and other quantitative techniques. You will innovate by adapting to new modeling techniques and procedures.
...
- Applying analytical rigor and statistical techniques to analyze large datasets, using advanced statistical techniques such as predictive statistical models, customer profiling, segmentation analysis, survey design, analysis, and data mining. You will build recommendations and optimization algorithmic designs, perform data retrieval, complexity analysis, and clinical computing.
...
- Programming using a tech stack that includes Python, PySpark, Matplotlib, TensorFlow, PyTorch, and other relevant tools.
...
- Performing device learning strategies, and supervised and unsupervised algorithms to build predictive models and prescriptive solutions to support various business use cases.
...
- Building algorithms like decision trees, regression, XGBoost, K means, and anomaly detection. You will also work with interpretable ML, Bayesian theory, and other advanced techniques.
...
- Utilizing Cloud Computing on Azure/Databricks, querying in Snowflake, and leveraging software tools and methodologies like GitHub, Continuous Integration and Delivery, and Agile Methodologies.
...
**Essential Qualifications**
...
- Bachelor's degree and a minimum of 4 years of experience in data science, device learning, quantitative or computational capabilities OR High School/GED and a minimum of 7 years of experience in data science, device learning, quantitative or computational capabilities.
...
- At least 4 years of experience working with large-scale, complex datasets to create/optimize device learning, predictive, forecasting, and/or optimization models.
...
- Advanced experience in SQL, Python, PySpark, or other languages.
...
- Advanced degree skills in exploratory data analysis, feature engineering, and selection, detecting patterns, learning distributions, visualizing results, and extracting insights to support businesses in making informed data-driven decisions.
...
- Experience using decision trees, and building classifiers.
...
- Experience with supervised learning techniques (linear and logistic regression, time series modeling, generalized linear models, decision trees, support vector machines, etc.) and unsupervised learning techniques (K means, hierarchical clustering, association rules, principal components).
...
- Experience with Cloud ML systems, distributed computing, data pipelines, cloud data stores, and serving engines.
...
**Preferred Qualifications**
...
- Ph.D. in STEM, PC science, statistics systems, physics, mathematics, statistics, data science, device learning, or similar.
- Experience working with IoT, and Edge AI is a plus.
- Experience in Reinforcement Learning is a plus.
- Experience in Healthcare is a plus.
...
If you are a motivated and experienced data scientist looking to join a dynamic team that is revolutionizing the healthcare and retail industry, please apply to this exciting opportunity.

# Experienced Full Stack Data Scientist – Real-World Evidence (RWE) and Analytics
...
Are you a highly skilled and motivated data scientist looking to join a dynamic team at careerzynith, a leading healthcare and retail company? Do you have a passion for leveraging advanced analytics and data science techniques to drive business growth and improve patient outcomes? If so, we invite you to apply for the Experienced Full Stack Data Scientist – Real-World Evidence (RWE) and Analytics position at careerzynith.
...
We are seeking an experienced full stack data scientist to join our Clinical Trial group at careerzynith. As a data scientist, you will be responsible for producing high-quality, actionable insights from real-world evidence (RWE) and real-world data (RWD) to support biopharmaceutical RWE and clinical trial requests. You will work closely with cross-functional teams to design and execute analytics strategies, develop and maintain data pipelines, and build dashboards and reports to support business decisions.
...
- Develop and maintain data pipelines to extract, transform, and load (ETL) data from various sources, including in-house data properties and certified systems
...
- Design and execute advanced analytics and statistical models to analyze RWE/RWD and identify new insights about patient populations and treatment outcomes
...
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to develop and implement analytics strategies that support business decisions and drive growth
...
- Build and maintain dashboards, reports, and other visualizations to communicate insights and results to stakeholders
...
- Conduct due diligence on new RWE companies and evaluate RWD quality to inform investment decisions
...
- Stay up-to-date with industry trends and advancements in data science and analytics, and apply this knowledge to improve processes and outcomes
...
- Bachelor's degree or higher in a quantitative or computational field, such as computer science, mathematics, statistics, or engineering
...
- At least 4 years of experience in a quantitative or computational role, with a strong focus on data analysis and interpretation
...
- Proficiency in programming languages such as R, Python, or SQL, with experience in designing and executing strong and reproducible statistical analyses
...
- Knowledge of common statistical testing methods, including generalized linear models, classification and regression trees, decision trees, unsupervised learning, time series analysis, and survival analysis
...
- Experience working with large datasets from various sources, including electronic health records (EHRs), claims databases, and other healthcare data sources
...
- Familiarity with data visualization tools such as Tableau, Power BI, Alteryx, Spotfire, or other business intelligence (BI) tools
...
- Ph.D. or Master's degree in a field such as statistics, biostatistics, computer science, mathematics, or engineering
- Expertise in EMR/Health IT, disease registries, and claims databases
...
- Knowledge of clinical data standards, clinical terminologies, and managed vocabularies used in healthcare data and ontologies (ICD9/10/ReadCode)
...
- Experience with Good Clinical Practice (GCP) and/or regulatory compliance guidelines for RWE research or clinical trials (e.g., ISO, MDD/MDR, CFR)
...
- Experience working with alternative data sources and alternative methods of healthcare data collection, particularly those enabled by technology systems and/or solutions
...

results.title: Srinidhi Kandimalla
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist @ CVS Health | AI/ML & Generative AI Engineer | Agentic AI, LangGraph, MCP | Java 21, Spring Boot, Microservices | RAG, LLMs | Azure, AWS, GCP | MLOps
...
With over 11 years of experience, I specialize in machine learning, AI, and data-driven solutions to address complex challenges in healthcare and enterprise operations. As a Senior Data Scientist at CVS Health, I leverage my expertise in building predictive models, scalable data pipelines, and generative AI systems to enhance claims processing, customer engagement, and fraud detection. I am passionate about using advanced analytics to drive innovation and improve organizational efficiency, while ensuring compliance and ethical AI practices. At CVS Health, I have developed and deployed cutting-edge data solutions, including retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines utilizing Azure OpenAI and Hugging Face frameworks. By integrating tools like Azure Databricks and Delta Lake, I contributed to building scalable pipelines and executing advanced feature engineering to support predictive modeling. My collaborative efforts drive impactful results in healthcare and pharmacy operations, while fostering a data-centric culture within the organization.
...
CVS Health – Senior Data Scientist Senior Data Scientist at CVS Health responsible for building and deploying machine learning, analytics, and generative AI solutions across healthcare, pharmacy, and enterprise operations. Designed data-driven systems supporting claims processing, customer engagement, fraud detection, and regulatory compliance. Built scalable data pipelines on Azure Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Delta Lake to process claims, pharmacy transactions, and customer interaction data. Performed exploratory data analysis, feature engineering, and statistical profiling to support predictive modeling and AI initiatives. Developed retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines using Azure OpenAI, Hugging Face models, and vector databases to enable secure knowledge search and question answering across internal healthcare and financial documentation. Created LLM-powered tools for compliance analysis, customer support, and executive reporting. Built and deployed machine learning models for classification, anomaly detection, and risk scoring using Python, Scikit-learn, PyTorch, and TensorFlow. Implemented NLP pipelines for document classification, sentiment analysis, PII/PHI detection, and summarization to automate claims and compliance workflows. Deployed models through FastAPI, Azure Functions, and AKS, and established MLOps pipelines with MLflow and Azure DevOps for monitoring, versioning, and CI/CD. Worked closely with compliance, legal, and business teams to ensure explainable and regulatory-compliant AI solutions.

# **Experienced Full Stack Data Scientist – Walgreens Data Entry Jobs at arenaflex**
...
Join arenaflex, a leading healthcare and retail company, as a Full Stack Data Scientist in our Walgreens Data Entry Jobs team. As a key member of our team, you will utilize your expertise in data science, predictive analytics, and machine learning to drive business growth and improve customer experiences. If you're passionate about working with complex data sets, developing innovative solutions, and collaborating with cross-functional teams, we encourage you to apply.
...
As a Full Stack Data Scientist at arenaflex, you will be responsible for:
...
- Building models and tools using technical expertise in machine learning, statistical modeling, probability and decision theory, and other quantitative methods. You will innovate by adapting to new modeling techniques and procedures.
...
- Applying analytical rigor and statistical techniques to analyze large datasets, using advanced statistical methods such as predictive statistical models, customer profiling, segmentation analysis, survey design, analysis, and data mining. You will build recommendations and optimization algorithmic designs, perform data retrieval, complexity analysis, and clinical computing.
...
- Programming using a tech stack that includes Python, PySpark, Matplotlib, TensorFlow, PyTorch, and other relevant tools.
...
- Performing machine learning strategies, and supervised and unsupervised algorithms to build predictive models and prescriptive solutions to support various business use cases.
...
- Building algorithms like decision trees, regression, XGBoost, K means, and anomaly detection. You will also work with interpretable ML, Bayesian theory, and other advanced techniques.
...
**Essential Qualifications:**
...
- Bachelor's degree and a minimum of four years of experience in data science, machine learning, quantitative or computational fields OR High School/GED and a minimum of seven years of experience in data science, machine learning, quantitative or computational fields.
...
- M.S. in STEM, PC science, statistics systems, physics, mathematics, statistics, data science, machine learning, or similar.
...
- At least four years of experience working with large-scale, complex datasets to create/optimize machine learning, predictive, forecasting, and/or optimization models.
...
- Advanced degree skills in exploratory data analysis, feature engineering, and selection, detecting patterns, learning distributions, visualizing results, and extracting insights to help businesses make informed data-driven decisions.
...
- Experience using decision trees, and building classifiers.
...
- Experience with supervised machine learning techniques (linear and logistic regression, time series modeling, generalized linear models, decision trees, support vector machines, etc.) and unsupervised machine learning techniques (K means, hierarchical clustering, association rules, principal components).
...
- Experience with Cloud ML systems, distributed computing, data pipelines, cloud data stores, and serving engines.
...
**Preferred Qualifications:**
...
- Ph.D. in STEM, PC science, statistics systems, physics, mathematics, statistics, data science, machine learning, or similar.
- Experience working with IoT, and Edge AI is a plus.
- Experience in Reinforcement Learning is a plus.
- Experience in Healthcare is a plus.
...
At arenaflex, we value a great attitude and a willingness to learn above all. We offer a dynamic work environment, opportunities for career growth, and a chance to work with a talented team of professionals. If you're passionate about data science, machine learning, and driving business growth, we encourage you to apply.
